summary: Investigated SVG edit operations in editPpt. The page component src/view/editPpt/index.tsx only renders SlideEditor with svgContent and persists onChange to pptWorkflowStore.updateSlideContent. Actual Moveable interaction lives in src/components/SlideEditor/SlideEditor.tsx; drag/rotate write target.style.transform during interaction, resize writes style.width/style.height plus drag.transform. On renderEnd, src/components/SlideEditor/bakeTransform.ts bakes CSS transform into SVG transform="matrix(...)" and maps CSS width/height into native SVG attrs per tag, then clears inline CSS style values.
risks: For unsupported SVG tags in resize, bakeTransformToSvg currently does not persist width/height and only transform persistence applies if present.

summary: Disabled SVG element rotation in SlideEditor because downstream SVG-to-DrawingML conversion currently handles rotation incompletely and does not support rotate centers/matrix composition reliably.
implementation: Updated src/components/SlideEditor/SlideEditor.tsx: set Moveable rotatable=false, removed throttleRotate and the rotate event handler that wrote CSS transform, and updated comments to mention only drag/resize/text edit operations.
tests: Ran npx tsc --noEmit. It failed on pre-existing project errors in src/hooks/useAudioPlayer.ts, src/store/PptWorkflowStore.ts, src/store/UserStore.ts, and src/view/createPpt/index.tsx; no SlideEditor-related errors were reported.
risks: Drag and resize still write CSS transform during interaction and bake it into SVG transform on renderEnd. Future work should change drag persistence to x/y and resize persistence to native geometry in SVG coordinates to keep generated SVG pure.

summary: Connected Library page template grid to the existing PPT template API.
implementation: Updated src/view/Library/index.tsx to import getTemplates/PptTemplate, fetch /aiPpt/templates on mount, resolve relative coverUrl with VUE_APP_BASE_API, render loading skeletons, empty/error state, an API-driven featured template card, and standard template cards from remaining results. Removed static template image imports while keeping asset preview stock images.
tests: Ran npx tsc --noEmit twice. It still fails on pre-existing unrelated TS errors in src/hooks/useAudioPlayer.ts, src/store/PptWorkflowStore.ts, src/store/UserStore.ts, and src/view/createPpt/index.tsx; no Library errors were reported.
risks: Preview/use actions are still visual only and do not navigate or select a template yet. Category/search controls remain static and are not wired to filtering.
